quiz.question:
White jumps the knight into b4.

Can you force a skewer from here?

answers.text: Yes, a skewer can be forced but Black needs to prepare it first.

feedback.text: Excellent! Black can play ...Qc1+ & follow up w/...Bc4 on the next move.

distractors.text: No, no skewer is possible here.

feedback.text: That's incorrect. There is a way for Black to expose the lineup of White's queen and rook. Give it another shot!

distractors.text: Maybe, a skewer exists but White would have to blunder.

feedback.text: Not quite. A skewer does exist in this position, but White doesn't have to blunder for it to happen on the board.
